Prior turnover and experience conditions may be relaxed for Startups meeting quality and technical standards.
fd159fbd3facea3302d23d00123d13f53de1c4c2.ministry_must_show: Proof of Startup status and compliance

fd159fbd3facea3302d23d00123d13f53de1c4c2.rule_statement: Performance security for procurement of works must be between 3% to 10%.
Bidding documents must include detailed criteria for eligibility, evaluation, and special terms.
Bids with NIL charges will be deemed unresponsive and not considered.

977d2ed484cd10ae6797303d9783d05e411d7333.rule_statement: Procuring entity may request additional information from bidders as necessary
Any modification or clarification affecting bidding terms must be published or communicated
Bidding documents must allow bidders to question conditions and disclose rejection reasons
977d2ed484cd10ae6797303d9783d05e411d7333.ministry_must_show: Disclosure of rejection reasons upon inquiry

977d2ed484cd10ae6797303d9783d05e411d7333.rule_statement: Bidding documents must include provisions for dispute settlement from resultant contracts
Bidders must be given reasonable time to prepare and submit bids
Bids must be opened publicly with authorized bidder representatives allowed to attend
Specifications for goods must be clear and broad-based to attract bidders
Bidding documents must provide for pre-bid conferences for clarification on complex contracts
977d2ed484cd10ae6797303d9783d05e411d7333.ministry_must_show: Details of pre-bid conference in documents

977d2ed484cd10ae6797303d9783d05e411d7333.rule_statement: Criteria for bid responsiveness must be established for evaluation

29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.rule_statement: Criteria for bid responsiveness include delivery time, performance, payment terms, price, and operational costs
29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.ministry_must_show: Documented evaluation based on these criteria

29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.rule_statement: Bids must be evaluated based on conditions in bidding documents; no new conditions allowed
29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.ministry_must_show: Evaluation report confirming no new conditions

29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.rule_statement: Bidders cannot alter bids after the deadline for submission
Negotiations post-bid opening discouraged, allowed only with lowest evaluated responsive bidder in exceptional cases
Contract should be awarded to the lowest evaluated responsive bidder; if unable, next higher bidder may be considered
29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.ministry_must_show: Documentation of bidder evaluation and selection process

29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.rule_statement: Ministries must procure energy-efficient electrical appliances as notified by DoE
29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.ministry_must_show: Compliance with DoE notifications in procurement

29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.rule_statement: Successful bidder's name must be published on CPPP, department website, and notice board
29703d5dc4656a11c78f3b7dca050511131dd8ff.ministry_must_show: Evidence of publication in required platforms

bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.rule_statement: All bids can be rejected if competition is lacking or bids are unresponsive or overpriced.
bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.ministry_must_show: Justification for rejection based on specified criteria

bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.rule_statement: Lack of competition not solely based on bidder count; valid with one bid if conditions are met.
bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.ministry_must_show: Evidence of proper advertisement and reasonable pricing

bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.rule_statement: One effective offer in tender treated as a single tender contract.
Purchase committee members must not engage in bribery or misleading actions.
bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.ministry_must_show: Compliance with ethical codes and conduct

bfef210bf793e499882446d3d72ba34cc9e9f3ab.rule_statement: Consulting services involve non-physical, project-specific processes and exclude retired government servants.

e6151ee711818f9140b16ae558f5508b831ffaa6.rule_statement: Ministries can hire external consultants for well-defined jobs with clear content and time frame.
Collusion, bid rigging, or anti-competitive behavior is prohibited to ensure procurement transparency.
Improper use of information for unfair advantage in procurement is not allowed.
Financial transactions between bidders and officials that affect procurement decisions are prohibited.
Coercion or threats to influence procurement processes are strictly forbidden.
Obstructing investigations or audits of procurement processes is not allowed.
Providing false information or declarations in tender processes is prohibited.
Bidders must disclose any conflicts of interest.
Bidders must disclose any previous transgressions related to integrity in the last three years.
e6151ee711818f9140b16ae558f5508b831ffaa6.ministry_must_show: History of compliance with integrity rules

e6151ee711818f9140b16ae558f5508b831ffaa6.rule_statement: Procuring entity can take measures against bidders violating the code of integrity after a hearing.
Details regarding Buy-Back Offer are outlined in Rule 176.

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: Departments may trade old items when purchasing new ones with competent authority approval.
561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.ministry_must_show: Bidding document with trade clause and details

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: All Ministries must follow fundamental principles for engaging consultants and issue detailed instructions.
561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.ministry_must_show: Compliance with chapter rules in consultant engagement

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: Consultants may be engaged for high-quality services lacking in-house expertise with prior approval.
561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.ministry_must_show: Approval from competent authority before engagement

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: Ministries must prepare clear and concise scope and eligibility criteria for consultants.
561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.ministry_must_show: Document outlining objectives and criteria for consultants

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: Estimate reasonable expenditure for consultants based on market conditions and similar activities.
561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.ministry_must_show: Cost estimation based on market research

561184645411bdca2e41f7d49d89241f9d2b5b48.rule_statement: Identify likely sources for engaging consultants.

ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.rule_statement: For consulting costs up to 50 lakhs, prepare a long list of potential consultants via inquiries.
ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.ministry_must_show: Long list based on inquiries from relevant sources

ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.rule_statement: For costs above 50 lakhs, publish an Expression of Interest on GeM and CPPP, including project details.
ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.ministry_must_show: EOI published with project scope and criteria

ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.rule_statement: Shortlist at least three consultants based on responses from the EOI.
ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.ministry_must_show: List of at least three shortlisted consultants

ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.rule_statement: Prepare Terms of Reference (TOR) detailing objectives, tasks, schedule, support, and outputs.
Issue Request for Proposal (RFP) to shortlisted consultants for technical and financial proposals.
ba40ad3edff9ddc7fa4d88c38203f64bebc91c71.ministry_must_show: RFP document sent to shortlisted consultants

cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.rule_statement: RFP must include invitation letter, submission info, TOR, eligibility criteria, key positions, evaluation criteria, formats, contract terms, and review procedure
cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.ministry_must_show: Complete RFP document with all specified elements

cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.rule_statement: Proposals must be requested in a 'Two bid' system with sealed technical and financial bids
Late bids received after the deadline will not be considered
Technical bids must be evaluated by a Consultancy Evaluation Committee (CEC) with documented reasons for decisions
cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.ministry_must_show: CEC report on technical bid evaluations

cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.rule_statement: Only financially qualified bidders' bids will be opened for further evaluation
cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.direction: Open bids of qualified bidders only

cd0af9626e07c0597377852f99f509f96086789a.rule_statement: Consultant selection must follow methods outlined in Rules 192 to 194 as applicable
Quality and Cost Based Selection (QCBS) is preferred when quality is crucial for consultancy services

af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.rule_statement: QCBS is for consultancy procurement where quality is crucial; technical proposals scored first
af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.ministry_must_show: Technical proposal scoring criteria in RFP

af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.rule_statement: Only proposals with minimum qualifying score in quality are considered further
af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.ministry_must_show: Documented minimum qualifying score in RFP

af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.rule_statement: Final score combines quality and financial proposal scores based on predefined weights
af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.ministry_must_show: Defined weightages for quality and cost in RFP

af6647ea0efe536df95b0aaae915256753c118e0.rule_statement: Technical parameters weightage must not exceed 80% in scoring
LCS is for standard or routine assignments like audits and engineering design
Single Source Selection is allowed only in exceptional circumstances

2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.rule_statement: Direct negotiation/nomination for procurement allowed only in exceptional circumstances
Full justification for single-source selection must be recorded and approved
2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.ministry_must_show: Documented justification and competent authority approval

2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.rule_statement: Ensure fairness and equity in procurement, with reasonable pricing consistent with market rates
2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.ministry_must_show: Procedure for price reasonableness and non-splitting of services

2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.rule_statement: Ministry/Department must continuously monitor consultancy performance
Design competitions must be transparent, fair, and widely publicized
2b012fb2b52f23cd94133dd3c10bf40fcd4b2eb7.ministry_must_show: Publicity on website and procurement portal

118f167e1c1609a8588bbe5f75a20d7f86b2206a.rule_statement: Defines Non-Consulting Service as procurement with measurable deliverables, excluding goods or works
Ministries may procure non-consulting services for economy and efficiency, with prescribed procedures
Ministries must prepare a list of potential contractors based on inquiries and available resources
Tender enquiry must include work details, provided facilities, contractor criteria, and obligations
For services up to Rs. 50 lakhs, issue limited tender to more than three eligible contractors
118f167e1c1609a8588bbe5f75a20d7f86b2206a.ministry_must_show: List of eligible contractors and tender issued

4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.rule_statement: For non-consulting services above Rs. 50 lakhs, advertise on GeM and own website with bidding document links
4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.ministry_must_show: Complete web address for bidding documents

4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.rule_statement: Late bids received after the deadline should not be considered
4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.ministry_must_show: Strict adherence to bid submission timelines

4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.rule_statement: Evaluate, rank, and select successful bids for contract placement
Exceptional procurement from a chosen contractor requires Competent Authority approval and justification
4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.ministry_must_show: Detailed justification and circumstances for choice

4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.rule_statement: Ministry must continuously monitor contractor performance throughout the contract
For unaddressed procurement circumstances, refer to Rules 142-176 for goods procurement
Basic rules for inventory management apply to all Ministries or Departments
4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.ministry_must_show: Conformity with basic inventory management rules

4dfba1437728731ae0f8990829a6eb34869d0dd7.rule_statement: Establish procedures for receipt of goods and materials from private suppliers

d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.rule_statement: Officers must refer to contract terms and follow procedures when receiving goods from suppliers
d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.ministry_must_show: Compliance with contract terms during receipt

d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.rule_statement: All received materials must be counted, inspected, and certified for quality and quantity
d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.ministry_must_show: Inspection report and certification of received materials

d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.rule_statement: Details of received materials must be recorded in a stock register, preferably IT-based
d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.ministry_must_show: Updated stock register entries and certification

d2b3b48b68a4cdad9eccf456ec034a459e7d9e0b.rule_statement: Receipt and issue of goods from internal divisions must follow established protocols

6963722b57ae89b2ddaa53f64ad6fac888da8a96.rule_statement: Indenting officer must project an indent for goods and verify receipt for quantity, quality, and condition.
Officer-in-charge must ensure an indent is projected and obtain acknowledgment for materials issued.
For materials issued to contractors, obtain acknowledgment with recovery details signed by the contractor.
If unable to fulfill the indent fully, supply available materials and note this on the indent.
6963722b57ae89b2ddaa53f64ad6fac888da8a96.ministry_must_show: Entry of supply details in indentor's copy

6963722b57ae89b2ddaa53f64ad6fac888da8a96.rule_statement: Officer-in-charge must ensure safe custody and proper storage of goods, especially valuable items.
6963722b57ae89b2ddaa53f64ad6fac888da8a96.ministry_must_show: Storage conditions maintained as per requirements

f2d837f707c0e4586625e5fbc523c0218c29c7f6.rule_statement: Officer-in-charge must maintain item-wise lists and accounts for goods and materials for balance checks
Separate accounts for fixed assets in Form GFR-22
Separate accounts for consumables in Form GFR-23
Separate accounts for library books in Form GFR-18
Separate accounts for historical/artistic assets in Form GFR-24
Keep proper records and recover hire charges for fixed assets rented out
Verify fixed assets annually and record discrepancies
Verify consumables annually and record discrepancies

370f63d671c9e97e69b3ad2512cec1c172190b75.rule_statement: Verification must occur in presence of the officer responsible for inventory custody
A verification certificate and findings must be recorded in the stock register
370f63d671c9e97e69b3ad2512cec1c172190b75.ministry_must_show: Stock register updated with verification details

370f63d671c9e97e69b3ad2512cec1c172190b75.rule_statement: Discrepancies found during verification must be reported to competent authority immediately
Optimum buffer stock must be determined based on supply patterns and requirements
Inventory over a year is surplus unless justified otherwise; surplus items handled per Rule 217
370f63d671c9e97e69b3ad2512cec1c172190b75.ministry_must_show: Reasons for not classifying as surplus

370f63d671c9e97e69b3ad2512cec1c172190b75.rule_statement: Annual verification for libraries with ≤20,000 volumes; others have different frequency requirements
Loss of 5 volumes per 1,000 issued is acceptable; investigate losses of valuable or rare books

dcab31a341fac97dc3d2714b9d90b15767e08e69.rule_statement: Transferring officer must ensure correct handover of goods to successor with a signed statement
Items can be declared surplus or obsolete if no longer useful, with reasons recorded by competent authority
Competent authority may form a committee to declare items as surplus or obsolete
Book value and guiding price must be determined for disposal; original purchase price can be used if necessary
dcab31a341fac97dc3d2714b9d90b15767e08e69.ministry_must_show: Report in Form GFR-10 for disposal

dcab31a341fac97dc3d2714b9d90b15767e08e69.rule_statement: Responsibility for unserviceable items due to negligence or fraud must be fixed
Sale of hazardous waste must comply with Ministry of Environment guidelines; bidders need valid registration
dcab31a341fac97dc3d2714b9d90b15767e08e69.ministry_must_show: Proof of bidder registration for hazardous waste

dcab31a341fac97dc3d2714b9d90b15767e08e69.rule_statement: Goods with residual value above ₹4 lakh must be disposed of via tender or public auction
Disposal method for goods below ₹4 lakh determined by competent authority to prevent accumulation

1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.rule_statement: Hazardous surplus goods must be disposed of or destroyed immediately to prevent health hazards and pollution
1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.ministry_must_show: Evidence of disposal method and compliance

1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.rule_statement: Surplus goods with security concerns must be disposed of in a manner that complies with official secrets and financial rules
1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.ministry_must_show: Documentation of disposal process and compliance

1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.rule_statement: Disposal of certain goods must be conducted through an advertised tender process
1a93dfebb4415c94ec6ba4820015e7b9a47627b0.ministry_must_show: Tender documentation and compliance with rules

bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.rule_statement: Follow specified steps for disposal through advertised tender, from document preparation to goods release
Ensure transparency, competition, and fairness in the sale process with wide publicity
bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.ministry_must_show: Evidence of publicity efforts for sale

bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.rule_statement: Include all terms and conditions in bidding documents in clear language
Clearly state applicable taxes in the bidding document
Indicate location and condition of goods in the bidding document for inspection
Bidders must provide bid security, typically 10% of assessed price, specified in the document
bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.ministry_must_show: Bid security amount in bidding document

bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.rule_statement: Accept the highest responsive bid, negotiate if necessary, and counter offer to next highest if needed
Offer remaining quantity to next highest bidders if the highest cannot take all
bd0608a616d317257242be43e38a4d8ecd17c944.ministry_must_show: Records of offers to next bidders

8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.rule_statement: Ministries may auction goods directly or via approved auctioneers.
8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.ministry_must_show: Auction plan and details of goods

8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.rule_statement: Follow principles of transparency and competition similar to advertised tenders for auctions.
Reannounce condition and terms of goods at auction for bidders' benefit.
8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.ministry_must_show: Clear announcement of terms at auction

8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.rule_statement: Bid acceptance or rejection must be announced immediately; earnest money of 25% required on acceptance.
8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.ministry_must_show: Collect earnest money from successful bidder

8a34e4d4b748368753ce9190f6394e96c925688c.rule_statement: Auction team composition decided by competent authority, must include Internal Finance Wing officer.
If unsold, surplus items may be disposed of at scrap value with approval; other disposal methods allowed if necessary.
Prepare sale account for disposed goods in Form GFR 11, signed by supervising officer.

1865ef12c264a2e67e73fda3f111a4aa9e18ff52.rule_statement: Prepare a sale account for disposed goods in Form GFR 11, signed by supervising officer
Record and adjust all profits/losses; formal sanction required for losses
1865ef12c264a2e67e73fda3f111a4aa9e18ff52.ministry_must_show: Documentation of losses and competent authority's sanction

1865ef12c264a2e67e73fda3f111a4aa9e18ff52.rule_statement: Analyze and record depreciation losses under specified heads
Group non-depreciation losses under specified categories
Contracts must be made by authorized authority under Article 299(1) of the Constitution
1865ef12c264a2e67e73fda3f111a4aa9e18ff52.ministry_must_show: Proof of authority to enter contracts

1865ef12c264a2e67e73fda3f111a4aa9e18ff52.rule_statement: Contracts executed on behalf of the President must include specific wording after signature
General principles must be observed when entering into contracts

78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.rule_statement: Contract terms must be clear and definite, avoiding uncertain liabilities unless specified otherwise.
78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.ministry_must_show: Contracts must include precise terms and conditions

78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.rule_statement: Use standard contract forms with necessary modifications after obtaining financial details and acceptance.
Contract documents must be executed for turnkey works or maintenance agreements.
78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.ministry_must_show: Complete contract documentation for specified works

78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.rule_statement: Obtain legal and financial advice when not using standard contract forms.
No work should start without executing a proper agreement as per the outlined provisions.
78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.ministry_must_show: Proof of executed agreement before work commencement

78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.rule_statement: Contract documents must be executed within 21 days of acceptance; failure leads to annulment and forfeiture.
Avoid cost plus contracts unless justified; aim to convert to firm price contracts over time.
78138bac2a34a8e3834de624b74f8ae9a1739ec7.ministry_must_show: Record justification for cost plus contracts

63211463ffbee0d63148092f8f5c1c8d5708d5d7.rule_statement: Price Variation Clause allowed only in long-term contracts over 18 months; short-term contracts must have fixed prices
Include formula for price variations based on indices between Base level and Scheduled Delivery Date
Specify cut-off dates for material and labor in the price variation clause
63211463ffbee0d63148092f8f5c1c8d5708d5d7.ministry_must_show: Cut-off dates for inputs in contract

63211463ffbee0d63148092f8f5c1c8d5708d5d7.rule_statement: Price variation clause must set a ceiling on variations and pass on reductions to the buyer
Stipulate minimum percentage of variation for admissible price adjustments, e.g., below 2% no adjustment
Liquidated damages apply on varied price if deliveries are accepted late
63211463ffbee0d63148092f8f5c1c8d5708d5d7.ministry_must_show: Terms for liquidated damages in contract

63211463ffbee0d63148092f8f5c1c8d5708d5d7.rule_statement: No price variation allowed beyond original Scheduled Delivery Date for supplier defaults

c376b3f0f598c0cc9e55b795398920113abb992c.rule_statement: No price variation allowed after original Scheduled Delivery Date due to supplier defaults
Price variation may be allowed post-deadline only with contract amendment for Force Majeure or government defaults
Contracts must specify duties and taxes included in price, along with foreign exchange rates for imports
Contracts must state mode and terms of payment for admissible price variations
Contracts must include provision for contractor to pay all applicable taxes
Lump sum contracts should only be used in absolute necessity, with full justification required
Lump sum contracts must protect government interests adequately
Departmental supply of materials should be minimized; if done, a schedule of quantities and rates must be included
Contracts involving government property must include provisions for safeguarding and recovery of hire charges
Contracts must provide for periodic verification of items at contractor's premises, with results recorded
Contract implementation must be monitored, with prompt notices for breaches

023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.rule_statement: Contracts must be monitored closely, with prompt notices for any breaches
023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.ministry_must_show: Records of monitoring and breach notices issued

023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.rule_statement: Establish procedures for safe custody and monthly review of Bank Guarantees and instruments
023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.ministry_must_show: Documentation of reviews and extension requests

023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.rule_statement: Seek legal advice before taking action on contract disputes
023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.ministry_must_show: Legal advice documentation before dispute action

023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.rule_statement: Contracts over 25 Lakhs must be sent to Audit or Accounts Officer
Contract terms must not be materially varied once entered
Material variations require examination, recording, and approval before changes
023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.ministry_must_show: Documentation of financial effects and approvals

023b0de52e0c0026c4ed4814a6babb2ea67e70cf.rule_statement: Changes must be formalized as amendments signed by all parties
Extensions of delivery dates are not allowed unless force majeure occurs

a1cad702a2996ac0f685df4ed04420ab6b3dc0aa.rule_statement: Contracts must include a clause for recovery of liquidated damages for contractor defaults.
a1cad702a2996ac0f685df4ed04420ab6b3dc0aa.ministry_must_show: Justification for claims after three years

a1cad702a2996ac0f685df4ed04420ab6b3dc0aa.rule_statement: Every contract must have a warranty clause for repair or replacement of defective goods at no cost.
Contracts for goods must allow Government to reject non-conforming goods.
No payment claims from contractors will be entertained after three years from claim's arising.
75% of an arbitral award must be paid to the contractor against a Bank Guarantee if challenged.
Payments may be made into an Escrow Account for specific project-related uses.

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: Grants-in-aid can be given to entities with distinct legal status as per Delegation of Financial Powers Rules
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Legal entity status and compliance with financial rules

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: Grants can be sanctioned to Autonomous Organisations or registered societies under relevant statutes
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Proof of registration and compliance with statutes

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: NGOs must be selected based on defined criteria for grants supporting government welfare activities
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Documentation of criteria and NGO evaluation

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: Educational institutions can receive grants for scholarships or stipends for students
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Details of scholarship programs and beneficiaries

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: Grants can be provided to urban and rural local self-government institutions
Co-operative societies are eligible for grants-in-aid
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Proof of co-operative status and activities

d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.rule_statement: Grants can be given to societies or clubs of government servants for recreational activities
d1067ac34663937ff0ba33464c046afe00199e07.ministry_must_show: Documentation of club activities and membership

d68d050b5e41d4dfe7040c2fa048f9b8b8ad74c8.rule_statement: No new autonomous institutions without Cabinet approval
Autonomous Bodies cannot create new institutions without following appraisal/approval process
d68d050b5e41d4dfe7040c2fa048f9b8b8ad74c8.ministry_must_show: Approval from administrative ministry and Ministry of Finance

d68d050b5e41d4dfe7040c2fa048f9b8b8ad74c8.rule_statement: Stringent criteria must be followed for new autonomous organisations and their activities
d68d050b5e41d4dfe7040c2fa048f9b8b8ad74c8.ministry_must_show: Detailed examination report on necessity and alternatives

d68d050b5e41d4dfe7040c2fa048f9b8b8ad74c8.rule_statement: Encourage autonomous organisations to maximize internal resource generation and achieve self-sufficiency
Corpus Fund for Autonomous Body requires prior concurrence of Ministry of Finance if from budget; otherwise, administrative Ministry approval needed
Governing Body must review user charges and inform administrative Ministry annually before Union Budget
All Autonomous Bodies must maintain a database of grants, income, expenditure, and assets as prescribed
Designate an officer for financial advice; their concurrence is mandatory for expenditure sanction

516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.rule_statement: Ministry must implement peer reviews of autonomous organisations every 3-5 years based on size and activity
516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.ministry_must_show: Review schedule and criteria for evaluation

516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.rule_statement: Review must assess if the objectives of the autonomous organisation are being achieved
516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.ministry_must_show: Report on achievement of set objectives

516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.rule_statement: Review must determine if activities should continue based on relevance and completion status
Review must evaluate if activities should be performed only by an autonomous organisation
Review must check for similar functions by other organisations and consider merging or winding up
516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.ministry_must_show: Analysis of similar functions in other sectors

516628e280165ae5751e482730afcd84fdf3e8e4.rule_statement: Review must ensure staff levels are minimized and appropriate for current technology and outsourcing
Review must assess if user charges are levied at appropriate rates for sponsored projects
Review must explore maximizing internal resource generation to reduce government dependency
Outstanding organisations from the review should receive greater autonomy and flexibility in operations

14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.rule_statement: Autonomous organizations with budget over 5 crores must sign MoU with performance parameters and targets
14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.ministry_must_show: MoU detailing performance metrics and input requirements

14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.rule_statement: Peer review findings must be assessed and presented to Secretary for decision on grant releases
14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.ministry_must_show: Documented peer review assessment for grant release

14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.rule_statement: Institutions seeking Grants-in-aid must submit a detailed application including financial documents
14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.ministry_must_show: Complete application with financial and operational details

14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.rule_statement: Ministries must maintain a list of institutions receiving Grants-in-aid to prevent duplication
14cb3fa39150ac1260a1a1fe3324dcc8a3702b82.ministry_must_show: Updated list of grants on ministry website

a7e460ecff5dc5d2217551b1e01c5e72f1c61e3e.rule_statement: Grants awarded only for viable schemes with detailed budgets showing specific targets against outlay
Grants for reimbursement of prior expenditures treated as Central Financial Assistance, no Utilization Certificate needed
Grants must specify if recurring or non-recurring, with clear objectives and conditions attached
a7e460ecff5dc5d2217551b1e01c5e72f1c61e3e.ministry_must_show: Grant order detailing type and purpose

a7e460ecff5dc5d2217551b1e01c5e72f1c61e3e.rule_statement: Non-recurring Grants must specify time limits for spending or installments
Grant authorities must consider internal resource generation targets for grantees, especially for recurring Grants

e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.rule_statement: Unspent balances from previous grants must be considered for new grants; use PFMS Portal for bank balance checks
e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.ministry_must_show: PFMS Portal bank balance verification before grant release

e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.rule_statement: Cash balance should not exceed 3 months of requirements for timely fund release
e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.ministry_must_show: Justification for cash balance exceeding limits

e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.rule_statement: Funds must be released based on actual requirements; sanctions may precede fund release
All interest or earnings from grants must be remitted to the Consolidated Fund of India after accounts finalization
e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.ministry_must_show: Proof of remittance to Consolidated Fund

e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.rule_statement: Assets from government grants cannot be disposed of without prior approval from the granting authority
e5de280c7aba3d88886ddcd0d52fdf53125a252b.ministry_must_show: Approval for asset disposal from grant authority

7d598478e90b8c36c4af1599d3c789a63870a0f6.rule_statement: Sanctioning authority may set conditions for installment release of Grants-in-aid with Financial Adviser consultation
7d598478e90b8c36c4af1599d3c789a63870a0f6.ministry_must_show: Evidence of proper utilization for last installment

7d598478e90b8c36c4af1599d3c789a63870a0f6.rule_statement: CFA grants released in one installment upon evidence of achieving objectives and audited expenditure statement
7d598478e90b8c36c4af1599d3c789a63870a0f6.ministry_must_show: Complete evidence of objectives and audited expenditure

7d598478e90b8c36c4af1599d3c789a63870a0f6.rule_statement: Institutions must submit grant requirements by end of September for budget estimates
Ministry must finalize grant requests expediently and inform institutions by April of the following year
Grantee institutions receiving over 50% of funding must align employee service terms with Central Government standards

340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.rule_statement: Sanctioning authority decides ownership of buildings funded by Grants-in-aid; maintenance is grantee's responsibility
340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.ministry_must_show: Records of location, cost, lessee details, and lease terms

340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.rule_statement: Special terms or procedures must be included in Articles of Association before Grants-in-aid release
340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.ministry_must_show: Updated Articles of Association or bye-laws

340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.rule_statement: Grants-in-aid can only cover bona fide expenditures incurred within two years prior to sanction date
340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.ministry_must_show: Proof of eligible expenditures within the timeframe

340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.rule_statement: Refund terms for unutilized Grant-in-aid must be clearly stated in the sanction letter and bond
340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.ministry_must_show: Sanction letter and bond with refund terms

340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.rule_statement: Grants-in-aid to certain agencies require Executive Committee members to execute bonds before release
340f7349cbdb51f8a1e9fd75f1a8c22c7fbe8560.ministry_must_show: Executed bonds from Executive Committee members

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Grantee's Executive Committee must execute Bonds to abide by grant conditions by specified dates
Grantees must not divert grants or assign execution to other institutions
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of adherence to grant usage

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Grantees must comply with all conditions specified in the grant agreement
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Evidence of compliance with agreement conditions

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Failure to comply with bond conditions results in liability to refund grant with interest
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Details of non-compliance and refund calculation

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Bond execution does not apply to certain quasi-government and autonomous institutions
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Proof of institution type for exemption

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Centrally Sponsored Schemes must have measurable outcomes and provisions for monitoring and evaluation
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Documented outcome targets and evaluation plans

4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.rule_statement: Schemes should be designed in consultation with States and allow local adaptations
Similar schemes targeting the same population should be converged
Limit the number of schemes to maximize expenditure efficiency and ensure effective monitoring
4ccdc1bb1d78e128d2aa6e5fb0a37b06464e9012.ministry_must_show: Justification for number of schemes proposed

ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.rule_statement: Funds to States must be monitored via PFMS; ensure effective utilization and accurate reporting before further releases.
ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.ministry_must_show: Proof of effective fund use and capacity to spend

ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.rule_statement: Focus on achieving objectives, not just expenditure; avoid late-year fund releases in scheme design.
ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.ministry_must_show: Mechanism to prevent late fund releases

ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.rule_statement: Implement concurrent monitoring and evaluation for schemes; conduct periodic reviews for necessary adjustments.
Post-completion reviews of schemes by States/UTs must highlight any time and cost overruns.
Maintain a Register of Grants as per Form GFR - 21; fill columns with grant sanction details.
ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.ministry_must_show: Completed Register of Grants with attestation

ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.rule_statement: Columns (i) to (v) of the Register must be filled and attested by a Gazetted Officer upon grant sanction.
ed4aafa8186c2f7493475765cd22254409d107ee.ministry_must_show: Attested columns in the Register of Grants

4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.rule_statement: Maintain records to prevent double payment; bill must be attested by Gazetted Officer before submission
Sanctioning authority must verify grant conditions acceptance and ensure no duplicate payments
4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of conditions acceptance and payment history

4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.rule_statement: No bill signed unless noted in the Register of Grants against relevant sanction
4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.ministry_must_show: Bill entry in the Register of Grants

4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.rule_statement: Grantee institutions must maintain subsidiary accounts and submit audited statements post-utilization
Accounts of grantee institutions open to inspection and audit by sanctioning authority and CAG
4d26e3658d5f7c7fd35761e4e028d7c2eb3e862d.ministry_must_show: Access to accounts for audit purposes

5eca8aa4cbe4d0d4e010c20ae7321b01bbb4c08b.rule_statement: Accounts audited by CAG if grants/loans ≥ 25 lakhs and ≥ 75% of total expenditure, or if ≥ 1 crore
CAG continues to audit for 2 years even if thresholds are not met after initial audit
5eca8aa4cbe4d0d4e010c20ae7321b01bbb4c08b.ministry_must_show: Compliance with audit requirements for two years

5eca8aa4cbe4d0d4e010c20ae7321b01bbb4c08b.rule_statement: CAG can scrutinize procedures for grants/loans and access books/accounts of institutions
5eca8aa4cbe4d0d4e010c20ae7321b01bbb4c08b.ministry_must_show: Documentation of compliance with grant conditions

343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.rule_statement: Disclose if specified targets were met against utilized amount; provide reasons if not
Utilization Certificate must be submitted within 12 months post financial year closure
Failure to submit certificate on time may lead to blacklisting from future financial support
Institutions must choose their own Chartered Accountants for auditing accounts
343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.ministry_must_show: Proof of chosen auditor for accounts

343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.rule_statement: Auditing charges by CAG for local bodies must be paid by the auditee unless waived
343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.ministry_must_show: Payment of audit charges or waiver request

343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.rule_statement: Annual accounts must be submitted by 30th June; audit certificate by 31st October; report by 31st December
343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.ministry_must_show: Timely submission of all required documents

343dcd1f2076162076b4a6e99a2ab7f594c25c2a.rule_statement: Utilization Certificates for non-recurring grants must be in Form GFR 12-A

cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.rule_statement: Release of subsequent year's grants requires submission of provisional Utilization Certificate for prior year grants
cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.ministry_must_show: Provisional UC for preceding year's grants

cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.rule_statement: Grants-in-aid over 75% of total sanctioned amount need UC and audited statement from previous year
cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.ministry_must_show: UC and audited statement for prior year

cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.rule_statement: Internal Audit and Inspection Reports must be reviewed before sanctioning further grants
cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.ministry_must_show: Internal and Inspection Reports for consideration

cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.rule_statement: No UC needed for grants made as reimbursement based on audited accounts
UC for Central Autonomous Organisations must detail annual expenditure and pending adjustments
cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.ministry_must_show: Separate disclosure of expenditures and pending adjustments

cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.rule_statement: Unutilized grants can be carried forward and accounted in the next year
cd9b5db79ce91889df5bf89c3b438cfeae9a2624.ministry_must_show: Amount to be carried forward in subsequent year

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: Ministries must report funds and purposes for recurring grants of 10 lakhs to <50 lakhs in Annual Reports
d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.ministry_must_show: Statement of funds and utilization for Parliament

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: Annual Reports of organizations with recurring grants ≥50 lakhs must be submitted within 9 months post-financial year
d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.ministry_must_show: Annual Reports laid on Table of the House

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: Ministries must report funds and purposes for non-recurring grants of 10 lakhs to 5 crores in Annual Reports
d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.ministry_must_show: Statement of funds and utilization for Parliament

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: Annual Reports of organizations with non-recurring grants ≥5 crores must be submitted within 9 months post-financial year
d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.ministry_must_show: Annual Reports laid on Table of the House

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: In DBT schemes, bank intimation of fund deposits can serve as Utilization Certificate
d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.ministry_must_show: Maintain records of direct releases under DBT

d49e9674490153aaf3fdeaa53721501f8876a671.rule_statement: Clear performance parameters must be established for better oversight of Autonomous Bodies

e89a99c8088a922113a405268c906a0e480b0c67.rule_statement: Performance parameters must be clearly defined for better oversight of Autonomous Bodies
Grantee Institutions must submit performance reports within six months post financial year end
Non-recurring Grants reports must be laid before Parliament within nine months of the next financial year
e89a99c8088a922113a405268c906a0e480b0c67.ministry_must_show: Performance reports laid on Table of the House

e89a99c8088a922113a405268c906a0e480b0c67.rule_statement: Recurring Grants require performance reports, but grants under 25 lakhs may be exempt
Annual Reports of grants above 2 crore must be laid before Parliament without performance reports
For grants below 2 crore, include fund usage in Annual Reports to Parliament
e89a99c8088a922113a405268c906a0e480b0c67.ministry_must_show: Statement of funds and purposes in Annual Report

1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.rule_statement: For grants between 10 lakhs and 50 lakhs (recurring) or 10 lakhs and 5 crores (non-recurring), include performance assessment in Annual Report
1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.ministry_must_show: Statement of achievements or performance assessment

1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.rule_statement: For grants of 5 crores or more (non-recurring) or 50 lakhs or more (recurring), include detailed review of utilization in Annual Report
1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.ministry_must_show: Utilization review specifying achievements and expenditures

1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.rule_statement: Expenditure from Discretionary Grants regulated by orders specifying conditions and objectives; must be non-recurring
Other grants must be made under special orders of Government
Grants-in-aid for employee welfare must follow specified amenities list and conditions
1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.ministry_must_show: Compliance with amenities list for grants

1caa95f3d15a8050a8914e9d863bf5e2c610742f.rule_statement: One-time grant of up to 50,000 may be sanctioned for setting up a Recreation Club

8398bab59d392c673ecd1006ae1ccf71f04a06b3.rule_statement: One-time grant of up to ₹50,000 for setting up a Recreation Club
Grants-in-aid allocated on formal requests; responsibility lies with the Ministry/Department
8398bab59d392c673ecd1006ae1ccf71f04a06b3.ministry_must_show: Audited accounts by April 30 for fund allocation

8398bab59d392c673ecd1006ae1ccf71f04a06b3.rule_statement: Grants for amenities to Indian Audit and Accounts Department staff regulated by separate orders
Loan repayments in installments, typically annual with specified due dates
Early loan installment payments apply first to interest unless specified otherwise
Payments due on holidays considered timely if made next working day without interest penalty
8398bab59d392c673ecd1006ae1ccf71f04a06b3.ministry_must_show: Payment made on next working day

9a7b3061a66b7cb79f3e8430a11c121d6e49f2f7.rule_statement: If repayment due on March 31 is a holiday, recoveries made on the preceding working day
If repayment due on RBI holiday, shift to next working day unless it's March 31
9a7b3061a66b7cb79f3e8430a11c121d6e49f2f7.ministry_must_show: RBI holiday notice and adjusted payment date

9a7b3061a66b7cb79f3e8430a11c121d6e49f2f7.rule_statement: Interest and principal payments refer to the loan payment date; early payments affect interest due date
9a7b3061a66b7cb79f3e8430a11c121d6e49f2f7.ministry_must_show: Payment records showing adherence to dates

9a7b3061a66b7cb79f3e8430a11c121d6e49f2f7.rule_statement: For non-monetary adjustments, last date of month of adjustment is the loan drawal date
Loan drawal date is when amount is credited to State Government's account by RBI

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: Loans credited in April for previous year deemed paid on March 31 of that financial year
f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.ministry_must_show: Documentation of loan timing and adjustments

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: Lending Ministry must assess financial health and management of private institutions before loan sanction
f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.ministry_must_show: Evaluation report on institution's financial health

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: Loan applications from non-government parties require adequate budget provision and policy compliance
f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of budget provision and policy alignment

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: Applicants must provide financial documents and repayment plans before loan approval
Applicants must submit profit/loss accounts and balance sheets for the last 3 years
Applicants must disclose income sources and repayment plans for the loan
Security for the loan must be valued by an independent authority and not encumbered
Applicants must list past loans from Central or State Governments with details
Applicants must provide a list of all outstanding loans and their securities
f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.ministry_must_show: Complete list of current loans and securities

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: Purpose and economic viability of the proposed loan utilization must be detailed
f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.ministry_must_show: Clear purpose and economic analysis of loan use

f3ca18e2bd6826e422ba52f01922230ac4f14234.rule_statement: For loans to government institutions guaranteed by trusts, similar information is required from the trust

469bf2f9213e40d8c614a728cd18ec21ccf2b11f.rule_statement: Information required from trust managing a government institution when loan is guaranteed by it
Confidential inquiries from other departments required to assess previous loan performance
Loan shall be refused if previous performance was unsatisfactory
469bf2f9213e40d8c614a728cd18ec21ccf2b11f.ministry_must_show: Analysis of financial soundness and security adequacy

469bf2f9213e40d8c614a728cd18ec21ccf2b11f.rule_statement: Grant of loans to local bodies regulated by Local Authorities Loans Act and related rules
469bf2f9213e40d8c614a728cd18ec21ccf2b11f.ministry_must_show: Compliance with Local Authorities Loans Act

469bf2f9213e40d8c614a728cd18ec21ccf2b11f.rule_statement: Interest on loans charged at government-prescribed rates
Recovery of loans must follow Ministry of Finance's instructions on terms and conditions
Loans to be repaid in annual equal installments of principal and interest
Moratorium on repayment may be agreed upon, but not on interest

d23171c3b6f368566699ec720bf20a5674cfd80c.rule_statement: Loans to various entities sanctioned at normal interest rates; concessions via direct subsidy if justified.
d23171c3b6f368566699ec720bf20a5674cfd80c.ministry_must_show: Claim for subsidy after paying normal interest

d23171c3b6f368566699ec720bf20a5674cfd80c.rule_statement: Loan agreements required for non-State Government loans, including terms and inspection rights.
Written undertaking from wholly-owned Government Companies required before loans, no stamp duty applicable.
Loans to non-State entities require adequate security, typically 33.33% more than loan amount.
d23171c3b6f368566699ec720bf20a5674cfd80c.ministry_must_show: Justification for lower security if applicable

d23171c3b6f368566699ec720bf20a5674cfd80c.rule_statement: Loan utilization conditions must be certified by the sanctioning authority to the Accounts Officer.

b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.rule_statement: Certificate in Form GFR 12-B must be submitted at agreed intervals, confirming loan conditions are met
b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.ministry_must_show: Reports confirming loan utilization and compliance

b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.rule_statement: Certificate of Utilization required for all loans with specific purposes, except temporary financial aid loans
b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.ministry_must_show: Certificate of Utilization for specific purpose loans

b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.rule_statement: Utilization Certificate must be provided for each loan case where accounts are maintained in Audit Offices
b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.ministry_must_show: Utilization Certificate for each loan case

b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.rule_statement: Consolidated Utilization Certificates due within 18 months post loan disbursement for loans managed by Departmental Officers
b512d3312d70e04edf46952113bc18e082cebcd0.ministry_must_show: Consolidated Utilization Certificates by September of the second succeeding financial year

397d0adc7e9e2e2c6533cb3f6c17a3c4bb0918fe.rule_statement: Utilization Certificates must be submitted within a reasonable time after loan payment, ideally within 18 months
For loans with accounts maintained by Departmental Officers, 18 months is counted from the end of the financial year of disbursement
Due dates for Utilization Certificates must be included in the loan sanction letter and enforced strictly
Each loan installment is treated as a separate loan unless consolidated at year-end; interest payable separately
Sanctioning authority may grant a moratorium on principal repayment but not on interest
Authority can declare a loan closed if there's undue delay in taking the last installment
397d0adc7e9e2e2c6533cb3f6c17a3c4bb0918fe.ministry_must_show: Report on any delays in installment drawal

07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.rule_statement: Instructions apply similarly to loans repaid in non-annual installments
Installment calculations assume punctual payments; delays require interest recalculation
Loan agreements for government entities must include penal interest for overdue payments
07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.ministry_must_show: Include penal interest clauses in agreements

07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.rule_statement: Other loan agreements must stipulate higher interest for defaults and lower for punctual payments
07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.ministry_must_show: Document interest rate conditions in agreements

07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.rule_statement: Accounts Officer must report any loan payment defaults to the sanctioning authority
Interest free loans require prompt repayment; defaults incur government-prescribed interest
07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.ministry_must_show: Include repayment conditions in sanction letters

07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.rule_statement: Concessional loans require prompt repayments to maintain lower interest rates
07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.ministry_must_show: Document repayment conditions in loan agreements

07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.rule_statement: Defaults on interest free loans with subsidies will be recovered from the subsidy amount
07589b02b88a3da8cf9b6660f900703d3edd39c9.ministry_must_show: Include recovery clauses in sanction letters

43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.rule_statement: Authority must remedy defaults and consider penal interest on overdue amounts; normal interest applies if not penal
43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.ministry_must_show: Steps taken to remedy default and interest calculation

43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.rule_statement: Competent authority may remit or write off irrecoverable loans with prior MoF approval
43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.ministry_must_show: Documentation of irrecoverability and MoF approval

43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.rule_statement: Accounts Officer must maintain detailed loan accounts and ensure conditions are met
43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.ministry_must_show: Regular updates on loan recovery and compliance

43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.rule_statement: Audit cost instructions apply to loans as well as grants-in-aid
Principal Accounts Officer must submit annual statement of outstanding loans by September 30
43c4a5a453fc307131c95b99746fc08413253806.ministry_must_show: Form GFR 13 with loan details and defaults

53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.rule_statement: Projects funded by external aid must be included in annual budget proposals approved by Parliament
53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.ministry_must_show: List of projects with external funding in budget

53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.rule_statement: Department of Economic Affairs must execute legal agreements for loans or grants from external agencies
53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.ministry_must_show: Executed agreements for loans or grants

53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.rule_statement: CAAA is responsible for implementing financial covenants and must receive copies of all agreements
53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.ministry_must_show: Copies of all agreements with external agencies

53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.rule_statement: External aid must be received in foreign currency or INR and accounted for in the Consolidated Fund
53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.ministry_must_show: Records of external aid receipts in accounts

53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.rule_statement: Cash grants must be accounted separately from other types of assistance received
53df6efa37b586111c8328a704623a3911c1f744.ministry_must_show: Detailed records of cash grants received

c17b838d62f1b6f6e40890de988470b0c0fa9577.rule_statement: Cash grants must be accounted separately from commodity grants or other assistance in kind
c17b838d62f1b6f6e40890de988470b0c0fa9577.ministry_must_show: Clear records of cash grants received

c17b838d62f1b6f6e40890de988470b0c0fa9577.rule_statement: Administrative Ministries must provide funds as 'External Aided Component' in Detailed Demands for Grants
c17b838d62f1b6f6e40890de988470b0c0fa9577.ministry_must_show: Inclusion of external aid amounts in budget

c17b838d62f1b6f6e40890de988470b0c0fa9577.rule_statement: Project Implementing Agencies must initially spend before claiming reimbursement from the Funding Agency
Funding Agency provides initial advance for four months under the Revolving Fund Scheme

675b21e3b326acbc7d8c135c9bfbe10fb42394ea.rule_statement: Upon receiving reimbursement claims, advise RBI to debit Special Account with eligible claim amount in USD
If no Special Account provision, send claims directly to Funding Agency after eligibility check
Funding Agency may directly pay contractors upon request from Project Implementing Agency with supporting documents
Rupee equivalent of foreign payments to be recovered from Project Implementing Agencies or State Governments
675b21e3b326acbc7d8c135c9bfbe10fb42394ea.ministry_must_show: Calculation of rupee equivalent for recovery

23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.rule_statement: Administrative Ministry must release funds to Project Implementing Agency and instruct deposit of foreign currency equivalent
23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.ministry_must_show: Proof of fund transfer and deposit instructions

23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.rule_statement: State Departments must include proposed expenditures in Budget for State projects financed by external aid
23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.ministry_must_show: Budget proposal for external aid projects

23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.rule_statement: Disbursements under Reimbursement must be consolidated and reported for fund release to States
23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.ministry_must_show: Consolidated disbursement details sent to DoE

23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.rule_statement: Plan Finance Division must issue sanctions for fund release to States and inform Finance Departments
23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.ministry_must_show: Sanction copy sent to State Finance Department

23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.rule_statement: Chief Controller of Accounts must issue IG Advice for fund release to Project Implementing Agency within six weeks
23d82228a8749f56755cfeb8142c78dc7fdeae16.ministry_must_show: IG Advice issued within stipulated time

8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.rule_statement: Claims under Direct Payment Procedure processed per Rule 267(ii); disbursement consolidated and sent to DoE
8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.ministry_must_show: List of disbursements and request for release

8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.rule_statement: Plan Finance Division issues separate sanction for amount release and recovery to Controller of Aid Accounts
8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.ministry_must_show: Copy of sanction to State Finance Department

8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.rule_statement: Disbursement for Central or sponsored projects follows same process as Rule 267; funds released based on certification
8a688062d1674143fb04e1fc5aa6be540c3467cf.ministry_must_show: Certification of disbursement from Funding Agency

e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.rule_statement: Controller of Aid Accounts and Audit must ensure prompt repayment of loans as per agreements
e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.ministry_must_show: Evidence of timely repayments and compliance with agreements

e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.rule_statement: Foreign currency remittance arranged through designated banks; Rupee equivalent must be reported
e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.ministry_must_show: Reports of foreign currency remittance to Controller of Aid Accounts

e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.rule_statement: EAP funds must be under a separate budget head after parliamentary approval
e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.ministry_must_show: Budget head allocation for EAP funds

e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.rule_statement: Recovery of loans and interest is the responsibility of the respective Ministry or Department
Interest on external loans must be paid on due dates as per agreements
Interest payments classified under Major Head ‘2049-Interest Payments’
e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.ministry_must_show: Accurate accounting records for interest payments

e962d245763bb8dba95ff417684383129b3d3ea7.rule_statement: Exchange variation for fully repaid foreign loans must be adjusted as per government rules

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Aid in materials/equipment from foreign countries requires notification to Controller of Aid Accounts for budget provision
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Details of materials and their value to Controller of Aid Accounts

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Union Government's power to give guarantees is limited by Article 292 and Fiscal Responsibility Act
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Compliance with Article 292 and Fiscal Responsibility Act

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Central Government cannot give guarantees exceeding the prescribed aggregate amount
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Ensure guarantees do not exceed prescribed limits

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Powers to grant Government guarantees, including external borrowings, lie with Budget Division, DEA
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Request for guarantees routed through Budget Division, DEA

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Sovereign guarantees aim to improve viability of projects with significant social/economic benefits
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Justification for social/economic benefits of projects

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Guarantees enable public sector companies to raise funds at lower interest rates
Guarantees may be required for concessional loans from bilateral/multilateral agencies
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Documentation showing guarantee necessity for loans

edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.rule_statement: Ministries must follow guidelines for recommending guarantees or counter guarantees
edffc6874698c3794fdfa9a71bc57e7650a54759.ministry_must_show: Adherence to guidelines for guarantee recommendations

476703e3e796003a55e9bd73e9dea2a4a89a0dd2.rule_statement: Proposals for government guarantees must justify public interest, especially for approved borrowings.
Administrative Ministry/Department must consult Financial Adviser when examining guarantee proposals.
Consider public interest, creditworthiness, borrowing terms, and guarantee conditions when reviewing proposals.
Risk of new guarantees must be assessed by an independent unit, even if previously approved.
All guarantee proposals must be sent to Budget Division, DEA for approval before issuance.
476703e3e796003a55e9bd73e9dea2a4a89a0dd2.ministry_must_show: Submission to Budget Division for approval

476703e3e796003a55e9bd73e9dea2a4a89a0dd2.rule_statement: Ministries must provide operational data of Public Sector Undertakings as per GFR 26 with guarantee proposals.
Include effects of CAG comments on profitability and BIFR targets for the last three years in proposals.
476703e3e796003a55e9bd73e9dea2a4a89a0dd2.ministry_must_show: CAG comments and BIFR target comparisons

5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.rule_statement: Guarantees limited to principal and normal interest; other risks excluded
Government guarantees only for central public sector companies/agencies
5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.ministry_must_show: Proof of entity being a central public sector company

5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.rule_statement: No government guarantees for the private sector
5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of entity's private sector status

5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.rule_statement: Government guarantees not extended for external commercial borrowings
Guarantees may cover soft loan components of bilateral/multilateral aid, not commercial loans
No guarantees for grants unless performance assurance is a negotiation condition
Conditions may be imposed on guarantees, including fees and reporting requirements
Guarantees not for low priority objectives; alternatives must be considered
No guarantees for financially strong Central Public Sector Enterprises capable of raising funds independently
5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.ministry_must_show: Financial credentials and credit rating evidence

5ef8bf49e65e6b8d05f171d559282af5ea626923.rule_statement: Borrowings from multilateral agencies by Central Public Sector Undertakings are regulated

47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.rule_statement: CPSUs must borrow directly from multilateral agencies, with terms approved by GoI; guarantees need prior Budget Division approval.
47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.ministry_must_show: Approval from Budget Division if guarantee involved

47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.rule_statement: Borrowings must relate to projects approved by the competent authority of the Central Government.
47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.ministry_must_show: Evidence of project approval from competent authority

47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.rule_statement: If a GoI guarantee is given, an agreement for guarantee fee payment must be signed.
47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.ministry_must_show: Signed agreement for guarantee fee payment

47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.rule_statement: After approval, guarantees are executed and monitored by Administrative Ministries, which must report annually.
Administrative Ministries must ensure borrower meets loan servicing obligations and monitor utilization of guaranteed loans.
47dea6250ebd200bdb9193aa2202e36891e0a96c.ministry_must_show: Records of loan servicing and guarantee fee maintenance

38ab7a449955aa01c46d01b84fed86a2e2c8c22a.rule_statement: Guarantee fees must be levied as per rates notified by the Budget Division for all cases, including non-fund borrowings.
38ab7a449955aa01c46d01b84fed86a2e2c8c22a.ministry_must_show: Evidence of fee collection for all guarantees

38ab7a449955aa01c46d01b84fed86a2e2c8c22a.rule_statement: Guarantee fees should be levied before the guarantee is issued and annually on April 1st based on outstanding amounts.
38ab7a449955aa01c46d01b84fed86a2e2c8c22a.ministry_must_show: Records of fee levied on guarantees

38ab7a449955aa01c46d01b84fed86a2e2c8c22a.rule_statement: If guarantee fees are unpaid by the due date, they will be charged at double the normal rates for the default period.
Government guarantees up to 80% of project loans; lenders must bear at least 20% of net loss in defaults.
In exceptional cases, the government may guarantee 100% financing for organizations performing government functions.
Deviations from guarantee conditions must not be routinely referred to Budget Division; separate cases must be made by the Administrative Ministry.

d1fa17a2a25d2b0f34665877597b431683388a91.rule_statement: All guarantees must be reviewed annually to assess repayment and compliance with loan terms
Financial Advisers must ensure annual reviews and maintain a register of guarantees
d1fa17a2a25d2b0f34665877597b431683388a91.ministry_must_show: Updated Form GFR 25 sent by 10th April

d1fa17a2a25d2b0f34665877597b431683388a91.rule_statement: Annual reviews of guarantees for external loans conducted by credit divisions with Financial Adviser consultation

cd4345ac5642f6b9e48afde1ccf5c1925a4f5cee.rule_statement: Classify guarantees for repayment to RBI, banks, and institutions for various financial operations
Classify guarantees for repayment of share capital, dividends, and bonds by statutory corporations and PSUs
Classify guarantees related to agreements with international institutions for loan repayments and supplies
Classify counter guarantees to banks for letters of credit to foreign suppliers
Classify guarantees to Railways for payment dues by Central Government entities
Classify other guarantees not covered by the previous categories
Publish a disclosure statement on guarantees at the time of annual financial statement presentation

a0eb1a5df7ceef71b07e94e56ab94f3f46ae7733.rule_statement: Administrative Ministries must compile and submit guarantee statements to the Controller General of Accounts
Administrative Ministries must certify that guarantee amounts match total figures in Detailed Demands for grants
Summary statements must be certified to match information provided to the Controller General of Accounts and comply with IGAS-1
Guarantee Redemption Fund established for redemption of guarantees invoked by Central Government
Administrative Ministries must inform Budget Division of impending guarantee invocation in advance
a0eb1a5df7ceef71b07e94e56ab94f3f46ae7733.ministry_must_show: Notification of impending invocation and corrective measures

a0eb1a5df7ceef71b07e94e56ab94f3f46ae7733.rule_statement: Upon invocation, obligations may be discharged by sanctioning loans to borrowing entities with Budget Division approval
a0eb1a5df7ceef71b07e94e56ab94f3f46ae7733.ministry_must_show: Approval from Budget Division for loan sanction

a0eb1a5df7ceef71b07e94e56ab94f3f46ae7733.rule_statement: Proposals for additions to establishment must be submitted per DoE instructions

adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.rule_statement: Proposals for new posts must include current establishment costs
Proposals must detail cost implications of changes, including pay and allowances
Proposals must include expenditure for pension or retirement benefits arising from changes
adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.ministry_must_show: Estimation of pension or gratuity costs

adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.rule_statement: Proposals must explain how expenditures will be funded, including re-appropriations
Continuation of posts beyond specified duration requires Ministry of Finance approval
Proposals for emolument increases must be referred to Ministry of Finance for approval
All service matters must be maintained in a digitised format from entry to exit
Transfer of charge reports must be sent on the same day, signed by both parties
adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.ministry_must_show: Form GFR 16 signed by both parties

adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.rule_statement: Certain cases exempt from simultaneous signing of transfer reports
Short-term vacating of posts does not require simultaneous signing of transfer reports
adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.ministry_must_show: Report of transfer for short-term vacancy

adef7c8e7891720d89d673e10a1aa9c646adf189.rule_statement: New appointees must declare date of birth with documentary evidence

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: Service Books must be verified annually by the Head of Office with a certification of verification
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Certification of service verification in Service Book

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: Service Books maintained in duplicate; one copy for the office and one for the employee
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Provide employee copy within specified timeframes

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: Government servants must submit their Service Book for updating every January
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Updated Service Book returned within 30 days

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: Lost Service Books can be replaced for a fee of Rs. 500
All Service Books should be digitized for easy access and loss prevention
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Plan for digitization of Service Books

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: Retrospective claims are due from the date of sanction, not the effective date
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Compliance with time-limit from sanction date

af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.rule_statement: T.A. claims due the day after journey completion; must be submitted within 60 days
af4818af40409dfb93866f87d5db792843a76644.ministry_must_show: Claim submission within 60 days to avoid forfeiture

f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: Retired government servants can claim T.A. for court appearances only after acquittal judgement is pronounced.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Judgement date for T.A. claim submission

f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: LTC claims with advance must be submitted within 30 days of due date.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Claim submitted within 30 days if advance drawn

f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: LTC claims without advance must be submitted within 60 days of due date.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Claim submitted within 60 days if no advance drawn

f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: If LTC claim with advance is not submitted in one month, advance will be recovered.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Submission of claim after advance recovery

f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: Failure to submit LTC claims in both cases results in forfeiture.
Overtime allowance claims must be submitted within 60 days of the due date.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Claim submitted within 60 days post due date
