f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.rule_statement: Arrear claims must be submitted within two years to be settled by the appropriate officer.
f4aa64bbd976b3c2f3d413d7b2ed168c73e514ba.ministry_must_show: Claim submitted within two years of due date

9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.rule_statement: Claim date is when presented; withdrawals lapse after three months unless renewed.
Claims pending over two years must be investigated; valid claims should be paid after checks.
9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.ministry_must_show: Supporting documents and reasons for delay

9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.rule_statement: Heads of Departments can delegate claim investigation powers to competent subordinate authorities.
Refund sanctions regulated by Administrator or departmental authority per rules.
Refund sanctions must be communicated on the bill or attached as a certified copy.
9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.ministry_must_show: Attach certified copy of sanction if not on bill

9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.rule_statement: Link original demand to refund in Cash Book to prevent double claims.
9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.ministry_must_show: Record of original demand with refund reference

9ae98a82cdc9e7d29ed19502cd561a236ee98f83.rule_statement: Remissions before collection are reductions, not refunds.

1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.rule_statement: Remission of revenue before collection is a reduction of demands, not a refund
Refunds of revenues are not considered expenditure for grants or appropriations
Authority for refund of wrongly credited revenue is the one to whom original receipts pertain
1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.ministry_must_show: Evidence of original receipts and misclassification

1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.rule_statement: Compensation for accidental property loss requires Ministry of Finance approval; not granted before bill submission
1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.ministry_must_show: Bill submission for loss and approval request

1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.rule_statement: Public debt management by government securities is handled by the Reserve Bank
1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.ministry_must_show: Compliance with Reserve Bank management rules

1ef2741f3e95bdf7bb7b5b0c00992cc7d1e18af8.rule_statement: Provident Fund recovery and withdrawal procedures must follow respective rules and be accurately prepared

d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.rule_statement: Maintain a complete list of subscribers to each fund in disbursing offices as a schedule
d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.ministry_must_show: Updated subscriber schedule in each office

d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.rule_statement: Add new subscribers to the list and indicate changes like transfers or subscription rates
d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.ministry_must_show: Revised schedule reflecting new subscribers and changes

d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.rule_statement: Record full particulars when a subscriber dies, quits, or is transferred
d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.ministry_must_show: Updated list with subscriber status changes

d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.rule_statement: Note transfer of subscribers in the lists of both originating and receiving offices
d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.ministry_must_show: Transfer notes in both office lists

d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.rule_statement: Prepare monthly schedule from the subscriber list to be appended to the pay bill
Deposit accounts of funds will earn interest at rates prescribed by Ministry of Finance
Maintain a register for recovery of Postal Life Insurance Premia in Form (GFR 20)
Keep the register updated and list policy holders alphabetically with space for new entries
d7b54da2fdf9e9a51c3718326292d36317392f1f.ministry_must_show: Current alphabetical register with space for additions

01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.rule_statement: Each policy holder with multiple policies must have a separate entry in the register
01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.ministry_must_show: Complete register entries for all policies

01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.rule_statement: Drawing Officer must note policy particulars upon receiving intimation from Director, PLI
01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.ministry_must_show: Register updated with transfer office details

01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.rule_statement: Recovery amounts for PLI premiums must be posted in the monthly register with references
Remarks 'New Policy' or transfer details must be noted for first-time entries
01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.ministry_must_show: Remarks column updated for new entries

01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.rule_statement: Government servants handling cash must furnish security as prescribed by the Government
01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.ministry_must_show: Security bond executed as per guidelines

01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.rule_statement: Security amount for cash handling determined based on actual cash handled, excluding cheques
01501c27ca57b92e7055452177fc55bf3558161e.ministry_must_show: Assessment of cash handling for security determination

b5562207deb18ed02e9f13c1ca1215abd03f622c.rule_statement: Security amount from a government servant based on actual cash handled, excluding account payee cheques and drafts
Security must be a Fidelity Bond; government servant must submit premium receipts timely to maintain bond
Officiating government servants must provide full security unless exempted under specific conditions
No security needed for custodians of non-considerable stores as per competent authority's opinion
No security needed for custodians of office management items if safeguards against loss are satisfactory
b5562207deb18ed02e9f13c1ca1215abd03f622c.ministry_must_show: Head of Office's satisfaction on safeguards

b5562207deb18ed02e9f13c1ca1215abd03f622c.rule_statement: Librarians and library staff are exempt from furnishing security
Drivers of government vehicles are exempt from furnishing security
Security deposit retained for at least six months post-vacation; bonds retained permanently unless no longer needed

f08e58b0c8e71011d52a007e3612bc0b9fef8033.rule_statement: No government land can be sold without prior government sanction, unless specified otherwise by law.
f08e58b0c8e71011d52a007e3612bc0b9fef8033.ministry_must_show: Obtain government sanction for land sale

f08e58b0c8e71011d52a007e3612bc0b9fef8033.rule_statement: Land transfer between Union Territories and Central Departments must be on a 'no profit no loss' basis.
Inter-department land transfers must also be on a 'no profit no loss' basis, not necessarily zero cost.
f08e58b0c8e71011d52a007e3612bc0b9fef8033.ministry_must_show: Agreement on transfer terms or value

f08e58b0c8e71011d52a007e3612bc0b9fef8033.rule_statement: Local bodies must pay estimated charges in advance for services unless authorized otherwise.
In emergencies, local bodies are exempt from advance payment for medicines from Medical Stores.
Unpaid loans from local bodies can be adjusted against non-statutory grants.

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Loans not paid on time may be deducted from non-statutory grants to local bodies
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: Record of unpaid loans and adjustments made

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Taxes collected for local bodies must go through the Consolidated Fund unless legally authorized otherwise
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: Legal authorization for direct appropriation if applicable

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Payments to local bodies must comply with relevant acts and be authorized by government orders
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: General or special orders for payment

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Accounts of local bodies will be audited by the Indian Audit and Accounts Department as per agreed terms
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: Agreement terms with the Comptroller and Auditor General

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Audit fees for local bodies will be charged based on daily rates set by the Government
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: Compliance with prescribed audit fee rates

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Cost recovery for Supplementary Audit waived if conducted by CAG's staff, enforced if by professional auditors
3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.ministry_must_show: Audit type and applicable cost recovery details

3c511bc0762908132ba9fbadde480f751e18251f.rule_statement: Financial transactions with local bodies must be rounded to the nearest Rupee

6638af979f78180bf5b5ec42e31f48aac3515ef1.rule_statement: Financial transactions with local bodies must be rounded to the nearest Rupee
6638af979f78180bf5b5ec42e31f48aac3515ef1.ministry_must_show: Compliance with rounding rule in transactions

6638af979f78180bf5b5ec42e31f48aac3515ef1.rule_statement: No Government record may be destroyed without adherence to specific departmental rules
Electronic records must have backups and adhere to retention periods and formats
Rules for contingent expenditure are detailed in the Subsidiary Instructions to Central Government Accounts
6638af979f78180bf5b5ec42e31f48aac3515ef1.ministry_must_show: Reference to Section III of relevant rules

6638af979f78180bf5b5ec42e31f48aac3515ef1.rule_statement: Permanent advance for contingent expenditure requires consultation with Internal Finance Wing
Advances for contingent purposes can be sanctioned by the Head of Office under specific conditions

2b54b30a8bdadd0b7c27075eb0b9f921d88a14e1.rule_statement: Adjustment bill must be submitted with balance details
Officers must exercise vigilance in public fund expenditure as if it were their own money
Honest errors may be condoned if acted in good faith; liability enforced for negligence
2b54b30a8bdadd0b7c27075eb0b9f921d88a14e1.ministry_must_show: Evidence of good faith and effort in decision-making

2b54b30a8bdadd0b7c27075eb0b9f921d88a14e1.rule_statement: Supervisors accountable for losses due to laxity in supervision of subordinates
2b54b30a8bdadd0b7c27075eb0b9f921d88a14e1.ministry_must_show: Assessment of supervisory actions and oversight

e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.rule_statement: Consider pecuniary liability and disciplinary action based on circumstances and officer's financial status
e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.ministry_must_show: Assessment of circumstances and financial impact

e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.rule_statement: Recover full amount lost through fraud from guilty parties; penalize lax supervising officers
e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.ministry_must_show: Evidence of fraud and supervisory laxity

e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.rule_statement: Consider recovering depreciated value of lost or damaged government property from responsible officials
e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.ministry_must_show: Calculation of depreciated value and officer's payment capacity

e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.rule_statement: Inform relevant authorities about irregularities involving pensionable servants; halt gratuity payments until resolution
e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.ministry_must_show: Documentation of irregularity and notification to audit/accounts officers

e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.rule_statement: Do not absolve guilty officials who remain in service due to others escaping punishment
e72fc33720625f12f28affabfd22728e2b71e474.ministry_must_show: Records of actions taken against all guilty parties

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: Avoid delays in investigating losses due to fraud or irregularities; seek assistance if needed
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Documentation of investigation process and timelines

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: Administrative authority may request Audit/Accounts Officer for relevant documents during investigation
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: List of requested documents and their relevance

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: If investigation is complex, apply for expert assistance from Government immediately
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Application for expert assistance and justification

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: Administrative and Audit/Accounts authorities are responsible for timely conduct of inquiries
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Records of inquiry progress and responsibilities

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: In cases likely to lead to judicial proceedings, involve Special Police Establishment or State Police
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Evidence of police involvement in investigation

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: Initiate departmental proceedings or prosecution against officials promptly based on inquiry results
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Documentation of proceedings initiated and timelines

de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.rule_statement: Conduct proceedings in strict adherence to Central Civil Services (Classification, Control and Appeal) Rules, 1957
de132b948445e65281e68bcb3b4babc3cf369036.ministry_must_show: Compliance with relevant rules and instructions

0f4e0cba9f9a85bfff55a5ed6565c4d40df62fc0.rule_statement: Estimates of Central Taxes and Duties prepared by specified boards within the Ministry of Finance
Union Territory revenue receipts estimates submitted to Ministry of Finance by designated officers
Controller of Accounts prepares estimates from departments by 30th November after data collection
Estimates must be submitted in prescribed forms by the due date each year for the Budget

ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.rule_statement: Revised Estimates must realistically project receipts for the remaining financial year based on trends and actuals
Budget Estimates must avoid undue optimism and consider seasonal variations in receipts
ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.ministry_must_show: Evidence of trend analysis and seasonal adjustments

ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.rule_statement: Exclude recoveries from Central Government in Receipt Estimates; include other recoveries
ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.ministry_must_show: Clear breakdown of included and excluded recoveries

ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.rule_statement: Interest estimates on loans must reflect realistic recoveries, including reasons for any defaults
ae9c1e5d0d71a835b16f109140ad91d382021b43.ministry_must_show: Detailed report on expected vs. actual recoveries

37495acabeecb7eace9061cb9ba3ba0af9a9cf73.rule_statement: Classify foreign grant receipts in cash under Major Head '1605' and commodities under '1606'
Commodities grants must reflect in expenditure estimates under Major Head '3606'
37495acabeecb7eace9061cb9ba3ba0af9a9cf73.ministry_must_show: Debits and credits for commodities grants

37495acabeecb7eace9061cb9ba3ba0af9a9cf73.rule_statement: Show final destination and use of aid materials in functional Head of Account
37495acabeecb7eace9061cb9ba3ba0af9a9cf73.ministry_must_show: Final functional Head of Account documentation

ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.rule_statement: Cash grants must have provisions in expenditure estimates under final functional Heads of Account
ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.ministry_must_show: Provisions for cash grants in estimates

ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.rule_statement: Estimating authorities must report only their own receipts for final accounting
ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.ministry_must_show: Communication of other receipts to concerned departments

ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.rule_statement: Budget Estimates must include both revenue and capital expenditure from the Consolidated Fund
ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.ministry_must_show: Detailed breakdown of revenue and capital expenditures

ecdb778aaac92d4f8a01ea7f83209883785699a6.rule_statement: Financial Adviser must obtain detailed estimates from estimating authorities in advance

05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.rule_statement: Revised Estimates must precede next year's estimates and include only likely payments for the current year
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.ministry_must_show: Detailed justification for estimates based on actuals and relevant factors

05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.rule_statement: Budget Estimates for the next year should reflect expected payments, including arrears, with economic considerations
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.ministry_must_show: Evidence of careful economic consideration in estimates

05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.rule_statement: No lump sum provisions allowed unless for urgent measures or preliminary expenses of accepted projects
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.ministry_must_show: Clear justification for urgent measures or preliminary expenses

05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.rule_statement: Token demands for big schemes require full financial implications approved before inclusion in Budget Estimates
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.direction: Avoid token demands without full approval
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.ministry_must_show: Approval of full financial implications before token demand

05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.rule_statement: Projects requiring token demand cannot start without Parliament's approval as they are new services
05dad31112876a0ffd643292819f050f93f225e7.ministry_must_show: Parliamentary approval for new services before project initiation

2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.rule_statement: All estimates must be prepared on a gross basis, showing 'voted' and 'charged' portions separately
2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.ministry_must_show: Separate reporting of receipts and expenditures

2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.rule_statement: Notional receipts in 'Receipt Estimates' must match adequate provisions in expenditure estimates
2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.ministry_must_show: Ensure alignment of receipts and expenditures

2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.rule_statement: Estimates must include all items accounted for in the Ministry's accounts, including Union Territories without Legislature
2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.ministry_must_show: Complete accounting of all relevant expenditures

2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.rule_statement: Works expenditure and pensions must be reported to the Ministry of Urban Development and Ministry of Finance
2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.ministry_must_show: Furnish details of works and pension expenditures

2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.rule_statement: Establishment charges estimates must consider trends from the last three years and relevant changes
2d650b12f4d3c7e4bcccd53ffb89ccfae454f713.ministry_must_show: Justification based on historical trends and changes

a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.rule_statement: Expenditure estimates must include full accounts classification and correctness must be ensured by Controllers
a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.ministry_must_show: Correct accounts classification and Grant details

a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.rule_statement: Revised and Budget Estimates must be submitted to Ministry of Finance by the prescribed date in triplicate using Form GFR 4
a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.ministry_must_show: Estimates in triplicate for each Major Head

a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.rule_statement: Major variations between Budget and Revised Estimates must be explained, especially for subsidies and loans
Highlight if estimates fall under 'New Service/New Instrument of Service' limitations and provide supporting details for new schemes
a7ea91c2db84c9d73e44ee91b27bdfd05797aee5.ministry_must_show: Details as per Annexure I and II

e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.rule_statement: Transfers of government assets to PSUs or non-govt entities must specify type (grant, equity, loan) and details of nationalization
e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.ministry_must_show: Full details on transfer type and compensation

e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.rule_statement: Takeover estimates must include compensation payment details and asset transfer provisions to PSUs
e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.ministry_must_show: Compensation and asset transfer details in estimates

e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.rule_statement: Budget Circular will dictate format for scheme allocation proposals for the upcoming year
e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.ministry_must_show: Submit proposals as per Budget Circular

e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.rule_statement: Ministries must finalize budget estimates showing total outlay and funding sources
e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.ministry_must_show: Statement of Budget Estimates with funding details

e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.rule_statement: Revised and Budget Estimates for schemes must be submitted in Form GFR 7 as per Finance Ministry directions
e4ad9ec329b663543f2dfc8297bd3084eb9e8083.ministry_must_show: Estimates in Form GFR 7 with relevant instructions

e8aae6d923ee8ea5f91891cd016d5c100f5b06a6.rule_statement: Exclude works expenditure accepted by Urban Development from other Ministries' estimates to Finance
e8aae6d923ee8ea5f91891cd016d5c100f5b06a6.ministry_must_show: Confirmation of exclusion in Form GFR 4

e8aae6d923ee8ea5f91891cd016d5c100f5b06a6.rule_statement: Clearly indicate provisions for equity investments, loans, and grants-in-aid in estimates
Include scheme expenditure in Administrative Ministry's demand, not Union Territory's area demand
All new services need prior Parliament approval, except new works under Capital section
Financial limits for new works under Capital section defined by specific rules
e8aae6d923ee8ea5f91891cd016d5c100f5b06a6.ministry_must_show: Compliance with financial limits as per rules

2765986d5d26bb41196494e51fb2492645065b48.rule_statement: Reporting limit for Machinery & Equipment is ₹ 50-100 crore with savings condition
2765986d5d26bb41196494e51fb2492645065b48.ministry_must_show: Savings within the same Grant section

2765986d5d26bb41196494e51fb2492645065b48.rule_statement: Parliament approval required for Machinery & Equipment above ₹ 100 crore with savings condition
2765986d5d26bb41196494e51fb2492645065b48.ministry_must_show: Savings within the same Grant section

802b06b1961ac2860f628a780a1b35c1aaf2236c.rule_statement: Investment reporting limit is up to 20% of original appropriation; above requires Parliament approval
ICT Equipment limit is up to ₹ 100 crore; above requires Parliament approval
Building and Structures limit is above ₹ 100 crore requires Parliament approval
Infrastructure assets subject to savings within the same section of the Grant
802b06b1961ac2860f628a780a1b35c1aaf2236c.ministry_must_show: Evidence of savings within the Grant section

802b06b1961ac2860f628a780a1b35c1aaf2236c.rule_statement: Other Object Heads decided on a case-by-case basis

7ac25c08fb32147c4a31d9e4de20c56a4c59f06b.rule_statement: Proposals for new services must include title, description, justification, implementation plan, and schedule
7ac25c08fb32147c4a31d9e4de20c56a4c59f06b.ministry_must_show: All required proposal details as listed

7ac25c08fb32147c4a31d9e4de20c56a4c59f06b.rule_statement: Financial implications must detail scheme type, total outlay, budget allocation, and foreign exchange components
Proposals must include comments from NITI Aayog and other consulted ministries/departments
Proposals must specify points requiring decision or sanction
7ac25c08fb32147c4a31d9e4de20c56a4c59f06b.ministry_must_show: List of required decisions or sanctions

20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.rule_statement: Demand for Grants presented at two levels: Main and Detailed, with specific content requirements
20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.ministry_must_show: Complete Main and Detailed Demands as per guidelines

20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.rule_statement: Part-I of Demands shows service details and gross amount estimates for Voted and Charged Expenditure
20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.ministry_must_show: Estimates for Revenue and Capital sections

20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.rule_statement: Part-II breaks down estimates to Major Heads for Main Demands and object head level for Detailed Demands
20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.ministry_must_show: Breakdown of estimates and previous year actuals

20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.rule_statement: All Detailed Demands must be consolidated in a single volume for presentation to Lok Sabha
20b997a65f5ba94a15e840c2b54f5296308c9c1e.ministry_must_show: Single volume of Detailed Demands for submission

d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.rule_statement: Compilation process begins in July/August with a manuscript skeleton based on current year demands
Send manuscript to designated press for proof, with a second proof if necessary
Printed skeletons should be available by 15th October each year
Send two copies of Demand skeleton to Principal Accounts Officer for filling previous year's 'Actuals'
d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.ministry_must_show: Filled copy returned by Principal Accounts Officer

d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.rule_statement: Post actuals, revised estimates, and budget estimates in the master copy of the Demand
Show 'Charged' items in italics, separate from 'Voted' provisions
Ensure accurate posting against proper item/head of account, including recoveries
Insert new items at the correct place under relevant minor head
d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.ministry_must_show: Incorporation of new items in master copy

d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.rule_statement: Correctly work out and post totals of sub-heads, minor heads, and major heads
Incorporate new sub-heads or changes sanctioned by Budget Division in the Master Copy
A sub-head should only appear if there is provision in the current or ensuing year
d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.ministry_must_show: Footnote for previous year actuals if applicable

d4292b0ad1b256bd521635ebbcda9cc01584147f.rule_statement: Compilation and printing of the Demands should be undertaken in stages

869f31fbd2e19a9c15fc19b956c6013b849dc9db.rule_statement: First proof of individual Demands to be obtained after posting previous year's actuals by 15th December
Second proof to be obtained by 15th January after posting Scheme Revised estimates
869f31fbd2e19a9c15fc19b956c6013b849dc9db.ministry_must_show: Scheme Revised estimates posted by the deadline

869f31fbd2e19a9c15fc19b956c6013b849dc9db.rule_statement: Notes on Demands must include objectives, provisions, variations, subsidy details, and project cost implications
Statement required for Budget provisions attracting New Service/New Instrument of Service limitations
869f31fbd2e19a9c15fc19b956c6013b849dc9db.ministry_must_show: Details of limitations in Budget provisions

869f31fbd2e19a9c15fc19b956c6013b849dc9db.rule_statement: Detailed Demands for Grants must be accompanied by specified schedules/statements

7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.rule_statement: Include schedule for estimated strength of establishment and related provisions
Provide project-wise expenditure for externally aided projects in Central Schemes
Include schedule for grants in aid to non-Government bodies
7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.ministry_must_show: Schedule of grants to non-Government bodies

7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.rule_statement: Statement of individual works/projects costing Rs. 5 crore or more is required
Provide revised cost estimates for public sector enterprises and departmental projects
Statement for transfer or gift of Government properties over Rs. 5 lakhs to non-Government bodies
Include statement of contributions to international bodies, excluding capital investments
Statement of guarantees given by Central Government outstanding as of 31st March
7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.ministry_must_show: Guarantees statement as of fiscal year-end

7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.rule_statement: Statement of grants-in-aid exceeding Rs. 5 lakhs (recurring) or Rs. 10 lakhs (non-recurring) to private entities
Include notes on important projects/schemes if performance budgets are not provided
Thoroughly check third proof from press for accuracy of estimates and data
7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.ministry_must_show: Serially numbered pages and table of contents

7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.rule_statement: Scrutinize sample printed copy from press and prepare errata if necessary
7cd693e3d414fe58eb153287f1ee8d1a3302e87a.ministry_must_show: Errata for printed demands if needed

dced71188681f6cd522269f5704d14bb4fb48615.rule_statement: Demands of smaller Departments must be prepared by the Ministry of Finance
dced71188681f6cd522269f5704d14bb4fb48615.ministry_must_show: Consolidated demand volume for smaller departments

dced71188681f6cd522269f5704d14bb4fb48615.rule_statement: Excess over sanctioned Grant arises from unforeseen emergencies or under-estimation

06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.rule_statement: Examine allotments to transfer funds to Disbursing Officers needing additional allotments without external approval.
06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.ministry_must_show: Evidence of available funds for transfer

06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.rule_statement: If redistribution is impossible, examine other detailed heads for savings and transfer if feasible.
06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.ministry_must_show: Documentation of savings and transfer authority

06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.rule_statement: If internal transfers fail, examine the entire grant for potential savings to meet funding needs.
06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.ministry_must_show: Report on potential savings across grants

06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.rule_statement: If no savings are found, consider postponing expenditure or applying for supplementary grants.
06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.ministry_must_show: Justification for postponement or supplementary request

06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.rule_statement: Supplementary Demand for Grants presented in batches as decided by Ministry of Finance, including specific urgent cases.
06e14badb5a0e98c85a6b6eb4661a877348a426a.ministry_must_show: List of urgent funding needs for batch submission

f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.rule_statement: All applications for supplementary grants must be submitted to the Ministry of Finance as prescribed
f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.ministry_must_show: Submit applications in prescribed format and timeline

f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.rule_statement: Ministry of Finance reviews supplementary grant applications and may deny if expenditure can be met from existing grants
f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.ministry_must_show: Evidence of ability to meet expenditure from existing grants

f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.rule_statement: Administrative Department must justify unbudgeted 'New Service' expenditures to the Ministry of Finance
f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.ministry_must_show: Explain why expenditure was not in original budget

f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.rule_statement: No 'New Service' accepted unless guaranteed funding from savings or economies
f6c486dd30508bfc3285fb200e3079d1b92f2d63.ministry_must_show: Guarantee that extra expenditure is covered by savings

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: These rules are called the Contingency Fund of India Rules
The Fund is held by the Secretary, Ministry of Finance, on behalf of the President
40% of the Fund corpus is available to the Secretary, DoE for unforeseen expenditure; further releases need approval
8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.ministry_must_show: Approval from Secretary, Economic Affairs for excess requests

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: Applications for advances must detail expenditure, circumstances, urgency, amount, and future appropriation
8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.ministry_must_show: Complete application as per specified details

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: Applications for advances must be made to the Secretary, DoE; new loans to Secretary, Economic Affairs
8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.ministry_must_show: Submit to appropriate Secretary as per rule

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: Advances can be made for unforeseen expenditure, including new services not in the annual statement
8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.ministry_must_show: Justification for unforeseen nature of expenditure

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: Order sanctioning advance must specify amount, grant, and expenditure details to Audit and Accounts Officers
8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.ministry_must_show: Forward sanction order with specified details

8d77873b708e3ab9b247f07032aa312c643fa6c0.rule_statement: All financed expenditure must be regularized through Supplementary Estimates unless resumed to the Fund

97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.rule_statement: Expenditure on new service can be met from savings within authorized appropriation with specific note format
97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.ministry_must_show: Complete note with amounts and re-appropriation details

97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.rule_statement: Advances from Contingency Fund must be resumed after Parliament authorizes additional expenditure
97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.ministry_must_show: Evidence of appropriation from Supplementary Appropriation Act

97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.rule_statement: If advance from Contingency Fund is unutilized, apply for cancellation or modification of sanction
97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.ministry_must_show: Application to sanctioning authority for action

97e953711b8fa2d47fe4636b0756bdde61fbd619.rule_statement: Advances for excess expenditure must be resumed to Contingency Fund after Appropriation Act passage

69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.rule_statement: Advances from the Contingency Fund during election years must be resumed after the Appropriation Act is passed
69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.ministry_must_show: Incorporate explanation in Notes on Demands for Grants

69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.rule_statement: Order resuming advance must reference original advance and Supplementary Appropriation Act
69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.ministry_must_show: Send copies to Audit and Accounts Officers

69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.rule_statement: Ministry of Finance must maintain an account of Fund transactions in Form ‘A’
Actual expenditure from the Contingency Fund must be recorded in detail as if from the Consolidated Fund
69dea5ea8cc7fb530e333e0d4508ab3693137009.ministry_must_show: Detailed records matching Consolidated Fund format

46ca37d07ecbc8758df60b6ec078e6a55a7ee4c3.rule_statement: State Governments succeed to all rights and assets of corresponding Indian States since Constitution commencement
46ca37d07ecbc8758df60b6ec078e6a55a7ee4c3.ministry_must_show: Documentation of property and asset transfer

46ca37d07ecbc8758df60b6ec078e6a55a7ee4c3.rule_statement: State Governments can dispose of property and assets at their discretion, with proceeds credited to state revenues
Transfer of land between Union and State Governments requires mutual agreement, except under specific Acts
Union Government bears costs for acquiring private land on its behalf
Union pays market value for land occupied by State Government when required
Payment includes capitalized value of land revenue lost by State due to transfer
Solatium under Land Acquisition Act does not apply to these transfers
State Government can assume possession of surplus land from Union Government under certain conditions
46ca37d07ecbc8758df60b6ec078e6a55a7ee4c3.ministry_must_show: Request for possession of surplus land

46ca37d07ecbc8758df60b6ec078e6a55a7ee4c3.rule_statement: Union Government decides necessity of retaining particular land

7fdfbc5a3a2ca03217fd7a80a89b3aac8af52a01.rule_statement: State Government must exercise option to take possession of land within six months of Union Government's intent
7fdfbc5a3a2ca03217fd7a80a89b3aac8af52a01.ministry_must_show: Notification of intent to assume possession

7fdfbc5a3a2ca03217fd7a80a89b3aac8af52a01.rule_statement: Amount payable for land is its market value at the time of transfer
State can take partial possession only if it doesn't materially reduce overall land value
7fdfbc5a3a2ca03217fd7a80a89b3aac8af52a01.ministry_must_show: Assessment of value impact from division

7fdfbc5a3a2ca03217fd7a80a89b3aac8af52a01.rule_statement: If State declines land, Union can sell it after consulting on conditions but isn't bound by State's concurrence
Disputes over land titles between Union and State Governments resolved by the Supreme Court
Market value defined as price in open market considering ground rent or assessment

1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.rule_statement: Treasurer's duties are defined in the Charitable Endowments Act, 1890 and related rules
1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.ministry_must_show: Adherence to the Charitable Endowments Act and rules

1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.rule_statement: Deputy Secretary/Director (Budget) appointed as Treasurer of Charitable Endowments since 1954
Upon receiving a vesting order, Treasurer must contact title holders for Title Deeds or securities
1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.ministry_must_show: Title Deeds or securities sent in insured cover

1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.rule_statement: Formal transfer of charge required at every change of Treasurer, with supporting documentation
1ac59930ddd3ae10a62f31ac38dc99136c58cf47.ministry_must_show: Charge report and balance statement signed by both Treasurers

9b9ae2c7ec78eabc54b083e8265392cff4e4df98.rule_statement: A charge report must be submitted when a State Treasurer changes
9b9ae2c7ec78eabc54b083e8265392cff4e4df98.ministry_must_show: Charge report as per specified format

1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.rule_statement: Trusts should ideally be vested in the Treasurer of Charitable Endowments; if not, open an account with an approved bank.
1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.ministry_must_show: Evidence of attempts to vest trust and bank account details

1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.rule_statement: Maintain full records of all transactions related to the trust fund in personal custody.
1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.ministry_must_show: Complete transaction logs compliant with trust terms

1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.rule_statement: Books of accounts must include a statement describing the trust's nature and obligations.
1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.ministry_must_show: Statement detailing trust obligations and references

1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.rule_statement: Accounts must be balanced and closed by March 31 and upon transfer of charge.
1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.ministry_must_show: Balance sheet signed by both officers during charge transfer

1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.rule_statement: Accounts are subject to audit checks as prescribed by the Government.
1525984468e6734b0bfd46505dd72f909685ed46.ministry_must_show: Readiness for audit as per government guidelines

9735c8dcb4f34de26855c063a872dd6e6bf1003c.rule_statement: These rules apply to charitable endowments beyond a single State or under Central Government authority
Private applications for vesting orders or scheme modifications require prior publication unless directed otherwise
9735c8dcb4f34de26855c063a872dd6e6bf1003c.ministry_must_show: Evidence of publication or directive from Central Government

9735c8dcb4f34de26855c063a872dd6e6bf1003c.rule_statement: Draft of proposed vesting orders or schemes must be published unless exempted by Central Government
A notice must specify a date for consideration of proposed orders or schemes
Central Government must consider objections or suggestions received before the specified date

d7e831577d18a55ba5259bcf4c8ca181c714a6b4.rule_statement: Applicant must pay costs of previous publication and related expenses for orders or schemes
d7e831577d18a55ba5259bcf4c8ca181c714a6b4.ministry_must_show: Proof of payment for incurred costs

d7e831577d18a55ba5259bcf4c8ca181c714a6b4.rule_statement: Only specified securities under Section 20 of the Indian Trusts Act may vest in the Treasurer
Trust administrators must maintain accurate accounts and submit annual abstracts to the Central Government
Fees for property vested in the Treasurer are based on actual charges incurred
All vesting orders must be filed in consecutive order and noted for register entries
d7e831577d18a55ba5259bcf4c8ca181c714a6b4.ministry_must_show: Consecutive filing and binding of orders

c716c2a7d82258fe36464d61c4170152584718dd.rule_statement: Treasurer must record receipt of securities in Form 1 and maintain separate accounts for each endowment in Form 2
Treasurer must enter all returned or sold securities in Form 3 and adjust Form 2 accordingly
c716c2a7d82258fe36464d61c4170152584718dd.ministry_must_show: Updated registers reflecting all securities transactions

c716c2a7d82258fe36464d61c4170152584718dd.rule_statement: Authorized person must forward securities to Treasurer, who must record and convert them into stock
c716c2a7d82258fe36464d61c4170152584718dd.ministry_must_show: Records of securities and stock certificates maintained

c716c2a7d82258fe36464d61c4170152584718dd.rule_statement: Treasurer must process interest securities through General Trust Interest Account and distribute accordingly

fbe7f927bf15d380033b16e23a4d5fac04162e6c.rule_statement: Registers in Form 1 must show all securities with the Treasurer; balance sheet in Form 4 required for verification
fbe7f927bf15d380033b16e23a4d5fac04162e6c.ministry_must_show: Certified balance sheet matching actual securities

fbe7f927bf15d380033b16e23a4d5fac04162e6c.rule_statement: Annual publication of properties and account abstracts in Official Gazette by June 15 each year
fbe7f927bf15d380033b16e23a4d5fac04162e6c.ministry_must_show: List of properties and account abstracts

fbe7f927bf15d380033b16e23a4d5fac04162e6c.rule_statement: Treasurer must register all non-security properties in Form 5 and note any divestments
Annual list of properties in Form 6; acknowledgements of correctness required within 3 months of publication
Annual audit of Treasurer’s accounts to be arranged by the Comptroller and Auditor General

c13f1734efa1490ee7b76f055bad59e158d190f8.rule_statement: Do not destroy records related to expenditure within legal limitation period
Do not destroy records for incomplete projects or schemes, even if beyond limitation period
Do not destroy records related to service claims and personal matters, except as specified
Do not destroy permanent orders and sanctions until they are revised
Do not destroy records with outstanding audit objections

09789897e19e37e57c8e65f3d477535c609ce066.rule_statement: Expenditure sanctions not covered by prior paragraph retained for 2 years or 1 year post-audit completion
09789897e19e37e57c8e65f3d477535c609ce066.ministry_must_show: Original nomination in Service Book for Group 'D' staff

09789897e19e37e57c8e65f3d477535c609ce066.rule_statement: Cash Books by Drawing and Disbursing Officers retained for 10 years
09789897e19e37e57c8e65f3d477535c609ce066.ministry_must_show: Maintain Cash Books as per rules

7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.rule_statement: Contingent expenditure must be accounted for within 3 years or 1 year post-audit completion, whichever is later
7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.ministry_must_show: Documentation of expenditure within the time frame

7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.rule_statement: Arrear claims must be processed within 3 years or 1 year post-audit completion, whichever is later
7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.ministry_must_show: Evidence of claim processing within the time frame

7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.rule_statement: GPF membership must be finalized within 1 year
GPF nomination must be completed within 1 year after final settlement of GPF account
7557e70c62b1b84c56e13c835169ddbe1e61ea93.ministry_must_show: Authenticated copy of nomination on file

00f055fc7b8c695e3a7ba2e35c89f5c5971f9f09.rule_statement: Final withdrawal from GPF for specific purposes retained for 1 year
GPF annual statements retained for 1 year
T.A./Transfer T.A. claims retained for 3 years or 1 year post-audit completion

aa249faffc8b89c4dc51e418e576df501f1cdfd1.rule_statement: Retention period for Budget/Revised Estimates is 3 years from compilation
Service books for officials entitled to retirement benefits retained for 3 years post final payment order
Service books for other employees retained for 3 years after cessation of service
Leave accounts for officials entitled to retirement benefits retained for 3 years post final payment order
Leave accounts for other employees retained for 3 years after cessation of service
Service records for family pension nominations retained for 1 year after benefits settlement

7b3aa7d7d6909f7e955b593d27cdb405e5b017e4.rule_statement: Alteration in date of birth must be retained for 3 years with proper documentation
7b3aa7d7d6909f7e955b593d27cdb405e5b017e4.ministry_must_show: Authenticated copy of order in service record

7b3aa7d7d6909f7e955b593d27cdb405e5b017e4.rule_statement: Admission of previous service without authenticated record retained for 3 years or 1 year post-audit
7b3aa7d7d6909f7e955b593d27cdb405e5b017e4.ministry_must_show: Suitable record maintained in appropriate location

c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.rule_statement: Service verification must be maintained for 5 years in records like Service Book or History Sheet
Expenditure statements for lower formations must be weeded out at the end of the financial year
Department expenditure statements to be weeded out after finalizing Appropriation Accounts
c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.ministry_must_show: Evidence of weeding out after accounts finalization

c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.rule_statement: Monthly expenditure register (Form GFR9) to be weeded out after finalizing Appropriation Accounts
c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.ministry_must_show: Evidence of weeding out after accounts finalization

c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.rule_statement: Surety Bonds must be retained for 3 years after they cease to be enforceable
c6fa3845f04c1e31312a93e30ea064b25a11f742.ministry_must_show: Records of surety bonds for retention period

db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.rule_statement: Pay Bill register must be retained for 35 years
db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.ministry_must_show: Maintain Pay Bill register for required duration

db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.rule_statement: Office copies of Establishment pay bills kept for 35 years
db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.ministry_must_show: Keep office copies for required duration

db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.rule_statement: Schedules to Establishment pay bills retained for 3 years or one year post-audit
Acquaintance Roll must be kept for 3 years or one year post-audit
db7fdae8344a55de5ba185e70a76a57f1ddf7ff3.ministry_must_show: Maintain Acquaintance Roll for required duration

6d4ce34881a83f0e0d49ef56abb5252e97951c83.rule_statement: Muster rolls must cover a minimum of three financial years excluding the payment year
6d4ce34881a83f0e0d49ef56abb5252e97951c83.ministry_must_show: Compliance with departmental regulations on muster rolls

6d4ce34881a83f0e0d49ef56abb5252e97951c83.rule_statement: Bill Register must be maintained in Form TR-28-A for 5 years
6d4ce34881a83f0e0d49ef56abb5252e97951c83.ministry_must_show: Proper maintenance of Bill Register in specified format

ecb3684d847729664a7b27cc52e4e8e9a280892d.rule_statement: Counter foils of paid cheques must be preserved for 5 years, or longer if needed for enquiries
ecb3684d847729664a7b27cc52e4e8e9a280892d.ministry_must_show: Compliance with preservation period and enquiry requirements

ecb3684d847729664a7b27cc52e4e8e9a280892d.rule_statement: Files related to contracts must be kept for 5 years post-fulfillment or termination, longer if audit objections exist
ecb3684d847729664a7b27cc52e4e8e9a280892d.ministry_must_show: Retention of documents until audit objections are resolved

31c07fe545da5cfd6a52c53ce8b9c783bbf5bfa4.rule_statement: Sub-vouchers for Secret Service Expenditure retained for 3 years post-financial year, pending audit completion
31c07fe545da5cfd6a52c53ce8b9c783bbf5bfa4.ministry_must_show: Completion of administrative audit and audit certificate

2cb0626f991b1cbc289f994a58befdc923884af8.rule_statement: Retention period for files starts from the year the file is closed, not recorded.
Retention for non-file records starts from when they cease to be current.
Records may be retained longer if warranted by special features or departmental needs.
Records related to another must not be destroyed until all issues of the latter are resolved.
Verify service of government servants before destroying pay bills/pay registers.
Preservation periods for Public Works account records are set separately by the Government.
Destruction of records can be ordered after the prescribed minimum period by authorized heads.
Heads of Departments can sanction destruction of useless records but must notify Audit/Accounts Officers.
2cb0626f991b1cbc289f994a58befdc923884af8.ministry_must_show: List of records for audit concurrence

2cb0626f991b1cbc289f994a58befdc923884af8.rule_statement: Maintain permanent records of all destroyed documents in each office.

89a3b0ebff3714cb487bebc67f8dfab7c75a3543.rule_statement: Continuance or revival of posts requires a retention period of 1 year
Conversion of temporary posts requires a retention period of 10 years

f9b1151884c434dd5a2b91df021092a95db5cce7.rule_statement: Creation of posts must be reviewed every 10 years
Revision of pay scales must be permanent for issuing departments; others keep standing orders
f9b1151884c434dd5a2b91df021092a95db5cce7.ministry_must_show: Current standing orders and weeding process documentation

f9b1151884c434dd5a2b91df021092a95db5cce7.rule_statement: Upgrading of posts must be reviewed every 10 years
Review employee suitability for service continuance must be permanent
f9b1151884c434dd5a2b91df021092a95db5cce7.ministry_must_show: Establishment/Sanction Register and old volume retention

b3b9ab1d76c0e22f5367245bd628bd0889f1ab33.rule_statement: Arbitration and litigation cases retained for 3 years unless specified otherwise
b3b9ab1d76c0e22f5367245bd628bd0889f1ab33.ministry_must_show: Justification for retention beyond 3 years if applicable

b3b9ab1d76c0e22f5367245bd628bd0889f1ab33.rule_statement: Files must remain open until award/judgment is final by limitation or appeal
Cases with significant issues or precedent value may be retained longer

8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.rule_statement: Notices under Section 80 must be retained for 1 year; if followed by civil suit, retain for 3 years
8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.ministry_must_show: Documentation of notice and civil suit follow-up

8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.rule_statement: Condonation of break in service records must be retained for 5 years with proper entries and authenticated copies
8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.ministry_must_show: Entry in service record and authenticated order copy

8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.rule_statement: Car Advance Rules must be permanently retained by issuing Departments; others keep only standing rules
8d8e1eb0ee19dfdc2ad699f388b7d575fe1ed963.ministry_must_show: Current standing rules and weeding out obsolete ones
